requirement: Create a Kubernetes deployment health checker skill that monitors pod status, detects CrashLoopBackOff, and suggests remediation steps
Create a Helm chart validator skill that checks chart templates for best practices, missing values, and Kubernetes API deprecations
Create a SAST code review skill that identifies OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities in Python and JavaScript code
Create a compliance audit skill that checks infrastructure configurations against CIS benchmarks for AWS/GCP
Create a SQL query optimizer skill that analyzes slow queries, suggests index improvements, and rewrites for performance
